headline: Is It Too Late To Consider FirstEnergy (FE) After A 30% One-Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether FirstEnergy's current share price lines up with its underlying value, you are not alone. The stock recently closed at US$51.31, with returns of 2.6% over 7 days, 1.5% over 30 days, 13.4% year to date and 30.1% over the past year. This naturally raises questions about how much of the story is already priced in. Recent news coverage has focused on FirstEnergy's role as a regulated electric utility and ongoing attention on its balance sheet strength and regulatory...
